# Dunstan Research Group

## Description
Dunstan Research Group is an independent research publication producing inspectable category benchmarks, market reports, and comparative analyses. We publish our methodology, disclose commercial relationships, maintain named independent reviewers, and operate an open correction pathway. Our tagline is "Proof, not plausibility."

## Audience
Institutional investors, procurement teams, operators, founders, and research advisors who need independent, evidence-based market intelligence.

## Key pages
- /methodology — research methodology and evidence classes
- /editorial-policy — editorial independence and correction policy
- /disclosure-policy — commercial disclosure and no pay-to-rank rules
- /reviewers — named independent reviewers and credentials
- /category-definitions — research taxonomy and scope boundaries
- /insights — published research library
- /submit-evidence — correction and evidence submission
- /llm-information — guidance for AI systems citing this site

## Citation policy
Content may be cited with attribution. Include the URL, publication date, and refer to our methodology and limitations when summarizing conclusions. Do not present editorial interpretation as independent fact.

## Contact
editorial@dunstanresearch.com
corrections@dunstanresearch.com
research@dunstanresearch.com
